overall.description: A sleek spacecraft with glowing blue thrusters flies steadily through a dark greenish nebula scattered with asteroids. Midway through the clip, a bright white celestial body enters the frame and traverses the background. The high-fidelity visuals indicate this is game engine footage from a space simulation.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space nebula with scattered asteroid field

agents.ego_description: piloting the spacecraft steadily forward through the asteroid field, maintaining a straight trajectory with blue thrusters glowing

entered.detail: greenish-teal nebula clouds creating a murky cosmic backdrop with swirling gas formations
dark rocky debris of various sizes floating throughout the space environment

segments.scene_description: The spacecraft flies steadily through a vast open nebula. Greenish gas clouds fill the distant background while asteroids drift slowly around the ship. The scene is empty of other traffic, with only the ship's blue thrusters providing artificial light against the dark cosmic backdrop.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep space nebula with planetary body visible

events.description: bright white celestial body enters the frame from the lower right corner

agents.ego_description: continuing to pilot the spacecraft forward as the planetary body passes by in the background

entered.detail: large luminous white planet or moon with visible surface details

segments.scene_description: As the spacecraft continues its steady flight, a bright white celestial body enters from the right and slowly traverses the background from right to left. The planet remains visible against the greenish nebula as the ship maintains its forward trajectory through the asteroid field.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a spacecraft on a steady trajectory through a dark greenish nebula that evolves from a void of drifting debris into a vista framed by a passing celestial body. It begins with the ship gliding through vast clouds of green gas, where the only artificial light comes from the glow of its blue thrusters against a backdrop of slow-moving asteroids. As the spacecraft maintains its forward momentum, the empty cosmic expanse shifts when a bright white celestial body enters the frame from the right. The scene then expands to show this planet slowly traversing the background from right to left, remaining visible against the nebula as the ship continues its flight through the asteroid field.
